channel.title: brabadu/awesome-fonts Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: brabadu/awesome-fonts Dec 15th, 2020
item.description:
Emojis

  • Crypto Puzzlesstars9 - Includes e

    • Iconic fonts

  • Crypto animal fontstars2 - This font translates alphabet characters into symbols. The english ordered version uses animals matching the first letter of their name.

item.title: brabadu/awesome-fonts Sep 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Programming fonts

Programming fonts with ligatures

  • Cascadia Codestars16.4k - Monospaced font by Miscrosoft designed to enhance the modern look and feel of the Windows Terminal
  • Dank Mono — A premium programming font with Delightful ligatures and an italic variant

    • Programming fonts

  • Operator Mono — A $200 premium programming typeface inspired by traditions of typewriting

    • Other

  • Easy Fonts - Makes webfonts easy to use for developers

item.title: brabadu/awesome-fonts Mar 5th, 2018
item.description:
Iconic fonts

  • Font-Awesome - The iconic font and CSS toolkit
  • openwebicons - Because Font Awesome had no RSS-icon and a font with only one icon would be a bit boring
  • typicons.font - 336 pixel perfect, all-purpose vector icons in a web-font kit

    • GitHub Showcases

  • Design Essentials

    • Free fonts

    Collections

  • Plexstars5.9k - IBM's open source font

item.title: brabadu/awesome-fonts Mar 7th, 2017
item.description:
General

  • Fonts In Use - A public archive of typography

    • Free fonts

    Collections

  • Font Squirrel - A curated collection of free fonts from a variety of foundries
  • Gidole - Open source, modern DIN
  • The League of Moveable Type - The Open-Source Type Movement
    • Chunk
    • Junction
    • League Gothic
    • ... And more

    • Free fonts

    Fonts

  • Redactedstars4.9k - Keep your wireframes free of distracting Lorem Ipsum
  • WorkSansstars1.3k

    • Iconic fonts

  • Appa Sariiconstars24 - 147 8-bit retro style webfont icons form web and mobile
  • Country Iconsstars7.5k - A collection of all country flags in SVG and CSS
  • Evil Icons Simple and clean SVG icon pack with the code to support Rails, Sprockets, Node.js, Gulp, Grunt and CDN
  • Font Customstars3.3k - Icon font generator
  • font-mfizzstars526 - Vector Icons for Technology and Software Geeks
  • FontAwesomeKitstars2.8k - Icon font library for iOS. Currently supports Font-Awesome, Foundation icons, Zocial, and ionicons.
  • fontello - Iconic fonts scissors
    • brandico.font - Font with logos of social services & messagers
    • fontelico.font - Open Source iconic font from Fontello project
    • typicons.font - Transformed Typicons
  • IcoMoon-Free - A package of flat vector icons together with an installable ligature font
  • Iconicstars2.4k - Icon set in raster, vector and font formats
  • icono - One tag One icon, no font or svg, Pure CSS
  • ionicons - The premium icon font for Ionic
  • Map Iconsstars1k - Font for use with Google Maps API and Google Places API using SVG markers and icon labels
  • Material design iconsstars42.8k - Official icon set from Google
  • mfglabs-iconset - Awesome web font icon by MFG Labs
  • Miconstars183 - Iconic Windows 10 font and CSS toolkit
  • octicons - GitHub's icon font
  • PE-Analog-Clock-icon-fontstars297 - A set of icons for displaying a visual ("analog") representation of time stamps
  • stackiconsstars984 - Icon font and Sass-based construction kit for Stackicons-Social, which supports multiple button shapes and a unique "multi-color" option in CSS for over 60 social brands
  • svg-icon - An ultimate SVG icons collection done right
  • weather-icons - 189 weather themed icons inspired by Font Awesome and ready for Bootstrap
  • Zocialstars190 - Sass and Compass CSS3 social buttons framework
    • CSS social buttonsstars1.7k - Entirely vector-based social buttons

    • Programming fonts

  • Adobe Fonts
    • Source Code Pro
    • Source Han Serifstars5.5k
    • Source Sans Prostars3k
    • Source Serif Prostars1.8k
  • Codefacestars5.5k - Gallery of monospaced fonts for developers
  • Go Fonts - Open source fonts from Golang Project
  • Input - Flexible system of fonts designed specifically for code
  • Meslo-Fontstars2.2k - Customized version of Apple's Menlo font
  • Nerd Fontsstars27.9k - Collection of over 20 patched fonts for Powerline, Font Awesome, Octicons, Devicons, and Vim Devicons

    • Programming fonts

    Programming fonts with ligatures

  • FiraCodestars55.9k - Monospaced font with programming ligatures
  • Fixedsys Excelsiorstars623
  • Iosevkastars12k - Spatially efficient monospace font family for programming. Built from code.
  • PragmataPro - Proprietary font with special ligatures for Haskell, Agda, APL, etc

    • JavaScript libs

  • fontminstars4.1k - Font minifier
  • localFontstars861 - Save fonts in localStorage
  • opentype.jsstars3.2k - Parser and writer for TrueType and OpenType fonts
  • Typr.jsstars670 - Parser and utility for working with fonts (TTF, OTF)

    • Other

  • Font Squirrel Webfont Generator - Upload OTF or TTF fonts, receive webfonts
  • FontForgestars3.8k - Cross-platform font editor
  • Powerline Fontsstars21.6k - Patched fonts for Powerline users
